backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that stores and manages a product catalog (Jaipuri Skirts, Kurtis, Sarees, and more) in a Map, exposing initialization functions and CRUD-like queries for the DivyaVastrav storefront.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state to the new shape by mapping over existing products and ensuring all have `available = true`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the Gopi Dresses product section, listing the affected frontend files and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and sets the page title to 'DivyaVastra'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the single-page storefront by returning the HomePage component directly.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component with a deep crimson Jaipuri-themed background, brand description, three product-category feature cards, and contact links for WhatsApp and Instagram.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Reusable product grid component that handles loading skeletons, error states, empty states, and renders a responsive grid of ProductCard components with a configurable accent color.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with a crimson/golden Jaipuri theme, brand info, social media links (Instagram and WhatsApp), and contact detail placeholders.
frontend/src/components/GopiDressesSecti: React section component that fetches and displays Gopi Dress products using FeaturedProducts, with a pink/rose themed decorative layout including gradients, floral dividers, and devotional copy.
frontend/src/components/GopiSkirtsSectio: React section component that fetches and displays Jaipuri Skirt products using FeaturedProducts, with a warm cream/crimson themed decorative layout styled around Jaipuri artistry.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a dark crimson/gold theme, brand logo, desktop navigation links to page sections, a WhatsApp order CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-bleed hero section with a background image, overlay gradients, a floating Krishna-Radha illustration, brand headline, tagline, and WhatsApp/explore CTA buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component that renders a product image, category badge, name, price, and a WhatsApp order button, with three accent color themes (crimson, golden, pink) controlling gradients and styles.
frontend/src/components/SareesSection.ts: React section component that fetches and displays saree products by category using a decorative Jaipuri-themed layout with golden accents and the FeaturedProducts component.
frontend/src/components/ShortKurtisSecti: React section component that fetches and displays Short Kurti products by category with a pink/floral-themed decorative layout using FeaturedProducts.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products (all or by category) and mutations for initializing various product categories (skirts, kurtis, sarees, gopi dresses) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the DivyaVastrav Jaipuri color palette as CSS custom properties along with reusable component classes like gold dividers and Jaipuri border patterns.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage component that assembles all page sections (Header, Hero, product sections, About, Footer) with decorative dividers between them, and auto-initializes product data via React Query mutations if no products exist.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the DivyaVastrav frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Cinzel, Lato, Poppins), oklch-based color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, feature history, architectural notes, and a summary of the DivyaVastrav e-commerce web presence including its visual theme and product categories.
